name: Sigma Lithium Corporation
content: Sigma Lithium is dedicated to producing environmentally sustainable, high-purity "Green Lithium" concentrate for the global electric vehicle battery supply chain. The company’s flagship Grota do Cirilo project in Brazil is one of the largest and highest-grade hard-rock lithium deposits in the world. Sigma Lithium utilizes 100% renewable energy and recycled water in its processing, setting a new global standard for sustainability in the critical minerals sector.
